scenarios.name: Draft a PRD for a new onboarding wizard
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a generic feature list with no quantified evidence, no primary or counter metric, no non-goals, no acceptance criteria, and no edge cases; treatment fills every section of the documented template — problem with evidence, one primary metric plus counter-metrics, explicit non-goals, INVEST-style user stories with checkbox acceptance criteria, an edge cases table, and a gradual-rollout launch plan with feature flag and rollback.

scenarios.name: Review a draft team-permissions PRD for completeness
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic advice without referencing INVEST or a structured rubric; treatment reviews the draft against the skill's checklist — INVEST per story, missing primary/counter metrics and non-goals, edge-case table coverage, feature-flag gradual rollout, and launch criteria — producing specific gaps rather than platitudes.
